title: Evaluation & Testing
description: Measuring agent quality, building test suites, and establishing confidence in agent behavior

lessons.title: Why Evaluation Matters
lessons.description: The unique challenges of evaluating non-deterministic, multi-step agent systems

lessons.title: Agent Benchmarks
lessons.description: SWE-Bench, GAIA, WebArena, and other benchmarks for measuring agent capability

lessons.title: Testing Strategies for Agents
lessons.description: Unit testing tools, integration testing loops, and end-to-end agent evaluation

lessons.title: LLM-as-Judge Evaluation
lessons.description: Using LLMs to evaluate agent outputs: rubrics, pairwise comparison, and calibration

lessons.title: Tracing and Debugging Agents
lessons.description: Tracing multi-step agent runs, identifying failure modes, and debugging strategies

lessons.title: Evaluation Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: build an evaluation harness with automated scoring and regression detection
